# 967 Coffee Co.

> Authentic Yemeni coffee shop in Roswell, GA (near Atlanta) — serving specialty lattes, traditional Yemeni drinks, and handcrafted desserts. Open until 2AM on weekends.

## About
967 Coffee Co. takes its name from Yemen's international calling code (+967). We bring centuries-old Yemeni coffee traditions — rooted in mountain farms dating back to the 15th century — to Roswell, GA and the greater Atlanta area. Every cup is crafted with hospitality at its core.

## Location & Contact
- Address: 11235 Alpharetta Highway Suite 136, Roswell, GA 30076
- Phone: (470) 292-3108
- Email: admin@967coffeeco.com
- Website: https://www.967coffeeco.com

## Hours
- Sunday–Thursday: 7:00 AM – 12:00 AM
- Friday–Saturday: 7:00 AM – 2:00 AM

## Menu Highlights
- **Yemeni Drinks**: Malaki, Qishr, Mufawar, Sana'ani, Adeni Chai, Iced Adeni Chai
- **Coffee**: Espresso, Cappuccino, Flat White, Americano, Cortado, Affogato
- **Lattes**: Yemeni Latte, Pistachio Latte, Biscoff Latte, Tiramisu Latte, Spanish Latte, Matcha Latte, Mocha Latte
- **Refreshers**: Strawberry, Mango, Passion Fruit, Dragon Fruit, Yemeni Lemonade, Mint Lemonade
- **Sweets**: Pistachio Milkcake, Biscoff Milkcake, Rose Milkcake, Dubai Chocolate, Honeycomb varieties

## Key Facts
- Rating: 4.9 stars from 600+ Google reviews
- Cuisine: Yemeni, Specialty Coffee, Middle Eastern
- Price range: $$
- Established: 2025
- Open 7 days a week, late nights on weekends
- Online ordering: Available via Clover
